regex_scripts.replaceString: <div class="z-status-box aincrad-term" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><style>.aincrad-term{--bg:rgba(15,24,46,0.94);--card:rgba(25,42,70,0.85);--border:rgba(90,160,230,0.4);--t1:#eaf4ff;--t2:#94b8d8;--t3:#4e7098;--accent:#ffd54f;--accent2:#4da6ff;--hp:#5cff7c;--exp:#ffb74d;--fa:#ff7b5c;font-family:'Arial',sans-serif;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:0;margin:16px 0;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 35px rgba(77,166,255,0.3),inset 0 0 50px rgba(77,166,255,0.06);position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:auto;width:100%}.aincrad-term *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}.term-scan{position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 3px,rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 3px,rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 6px);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}.term-titlebar{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(25,42,70,0.7)}.term-title-icon{width:24px;height:24px;border:1px solid var(--accent);clip-path:polygon(50% 0,100% 25%,100% 75%,50% 100%,0 75%,0 25%);background:rgba(255,213,79,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent)}.term-title-text{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--t1);letter-spacing:1px}.term-top-player{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);flex-wrap:wrap}.term-avatar-hex{width:48px;height:55px;clip-path:polygon(50% 0,100% 25%,100% 75%,50% 100%,0 75%,0 25%);background:rgba(77,166,255,0.1);border:2px solid var(--accent2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;color:var(--accent2);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(77,166,255,0.4);flex-shrink:0}.term-player-id{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}.term-player-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--t1)}.term-player-lv{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);border:1px solid var(--accent);display:inline-block;padding:1px 8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,213,79,0.08);width:fit-content}.term-top-stats{flex:1 1 auto;display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;min-width:0}.term-top-stat{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;min-width:120px;flex:1 0 auto}.term-top-stat-label{font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);width:36px;text-align:right;letter-spacing:0.5px}.term-top-stat-track{flex:1;height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)}.term-top-stat-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;transition:width 0.6s}.term-top-stat-fill.hp{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2dd35c,#5cff7c);box-shadow:0 0 6px #2dd35c}.term-top-stat-fill.exp{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f5a623,#ffb74d);box-shadow:0 0 6px #f5a623}.term-top-stat-fill.fa{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff5a41,#ff7b5c);box-shadow:0 0 6px #ff5a41}.term-top-stat-val{font-size:9px;color:var(--t1);min-width:60px;text-align:right}.term-body{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:1;display:flex}.term-main{flex:1;padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;width:100%}.term-main::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.term-main::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}.term-main::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--accent2);border-radius:2px}.term-panel{display:none}.term-panel.on{display:block}.term-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px}.term-card-title{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:bold}.term-card-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),transparent)}.term-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);font-size:11px}.term-row span:first-child{color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase}.term-row span:last-child{color:var(--t1)}.term-equip-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--accent2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--accent2);border-radius:4px;background:rgba(77,166,255,0.1);flex-shrink:0}.term-equip-info{flex:1}.term-equip-name{font-size:11px;color:var(--t1)}.term-equip-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--t2)}.term-equip-dur{font-size:8px;color:var(--t3)}.term-bag-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;max-height:85px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px}.term-bag-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.term-bag-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}.term-bag-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--accent2);border-radius:2px}.term-bag-item{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:9px;color:var(--t1);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}.term-bag-qty{color:var(--accent)}.term-task-box{background:rgba(77,166,255,0.06);border-left:3px solid var(--accent2);padding:8px;margin-bottom:8px;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0}.term-task-name{font-size:11px;color:var(--t1);font-weight:bold}.term-task-prog{font-size:9px;color:var(--t2);margin-top:3px}.term-task-reward{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent)}.term-skill-wrap{max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px}.term-skill-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.term-skill-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}.term-skill-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--accent2);border-radius:2px}.term-skill-row{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);align-items:center}.term-skill-icon{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);border-radius:4px;background:rgba(255,213,79,0.1);flex-shrink:0}.term-skill-info{flex:1}.term-skill-name{font-size:11px;color:var(--t1);font-weight:bold}.term-skill-sub{font-size:8px;color:var(--accent2)}.term-skill-desc{font-size:8px;color:var(--t2)}.term-npc-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px}.term-npc-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.term-npc-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}.term-npc-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--accent2);border-radius:2px}.term-npc-card{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px;background:rgba(77,166,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(77,166,255,0.15);border-radius:10px}.term-npc-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border:2px solid var(--accent2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;color:var(--accent2);border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(77,166,255,0.3);flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}.term-npc-info{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}.term-npc-header{display:flex;align-items:baseline;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}.term-npc-name-text{font-size:12px;color:var(--t1);font-weight:bold}.term-npc-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--t2)}.term-npc-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--t3);line-height:1.4}.term-npc-inner{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);background:rgba(255,213,79,0.05);border-left:2px solid var(--accent);padding:3px 8px;margin-top:3px;font-style:italic;line-height:1.4}.term-bottom-bar{position:relative;z-index:2;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2)}.term-round-badge{font-size:9px;color:var(--accent2);border:1px solid var(--accent2);display:inline-block;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:8px;letter-spacing:1px;background:rgba(77,166,255,0.1);align-self:flex-start}.term-tab-icons{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center}.term-tab-btn{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--t2);cursor:pointer;background:rgba(25,42,70,0.5);transition:all 0.2s}.term-tab-btn:hover{color:var(--t1);border-color:var(--accent2)}.term-tab-btn.active-tab{color:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,213,79,0.5);background:rgba(255,213,79,0.1)}.term-options{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.term-opt-btn{background:rgba(25,42,70,0.5);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;transition:all 0.2s;position:relative;z-index:10}.term-opt-btn:hover{background:rgba(77,166,255,0.12);border-color:var(--accent2);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(77,166,255,0.25)}.term-opt-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px}.term-opt-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--t2);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.4}.z-status-data{display:none}</style><!--
